scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r exec tsc -b && pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.mobile:web:preview: pnpm mobile:web:build && concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "pnpm api:prod" "pnpm exec serve apps/mobile/dist -l 3000"
scripts.db:setup:prod: pnpm db:wait && NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @pantrific/api db:gen && NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @pantrific/api db:push
scripts.previewhackathon: pnpm db:setup:prod && NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @pantrific/api seed && pnpm mobile:web:preview
scripts.db: docker run --rm --name pantrific-db -v pantrific-pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data -e POSTGRES_USER=root -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=root -e POSTGRES_DB=pantrific -p 5433:5432 postgres:17
scripts.db:fresh: docker rm -f pantrific-db 2>/dev/null; docker volume rm pantrific-seed 2>/dev/null; docker run --rm --name pantrific-db -v pantrific-seed:/var/lib/postgresql/data -e POSTGRES_USER=root -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=root -e POSTGRES_DB=pantrific -p 5433:5432 postgres:17
scripts.db:wait: until docker exec pantrific-db pg_isready -U root -d pantrific > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:wait && pnpm --filter @pantrific/api db:gen && pnpm --filter @pantrific/api db:push
scripts.dev: concurrently -n db,api,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm db" "pnpm db:setup && pnpm api" "pnpm mobile"
scripts.dev:seeded: concurrently -n db,api,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm db:fresh" "pnpm db:setup && pnpm api:seeded" "pnpm mobile:start"
